This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-hpgw-ww76-c68r. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
phpMyFAQ before 4.1.2 contains an authorization bypass vulnerability in AbstractAdministrationController::userHasPermission() that fails to terminate execution after sending a forbidden response. Attackers can access all permission-protected admin pages by requesting their URLs as authenticated users, exposing admin logs, user data, system information, and application configuration.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-w9mj-gfrm-hj5x", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-09T00:01:24Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-w9mj-gfrm-hj5x", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-w9mj-gfrm-hj5x"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-15T19:17:03Z", "published_at": "2026-05-15T21:31:32Z", "references": ["https://github.com/thorsten/phpMyFAQ/security/advisories/GHSA-hpgw-ww76-c68r", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46362", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/phpmyfaq-authorization-bypass-in-admin-pages-via-non-terminating-permission-check", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-w9mj-gfrm-hj5x"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: phpMyFAQ has an Authorization Bypass in All Admin Pages Due to Non-Terminating Permission Check", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T00:01:24Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-w9mj-gfrm-hj5x", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.1.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "thorsten/phpmyfaq"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.1.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.1.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "phpmyfaq/phpmyfaq"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.1.2"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-09T00:01:24Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: phpMyFAQ has an Authorization Bypass in All Admin Pages Due to Non-Terminating Permission Check
